    <item>
      <title>Why Kendrick Perkins is still not buying the Knicks after win over Celtics</title>
      <description>Former NBA champion with the Celtics and current ESPN analyst Kendrick Perkins was on Friday's edition of "First Take" and made it clear he is still not a believer in the Knicks overtaking the Celtics in the Eastern Conference.</description>
      <pubDate>11 Apr 2026 01:02:18 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/why_kendrick_perkins_is_still_not_buying_the_knicks_after_win_over_celtics/s1_13132_43711986</link>

    <item>
      <title>Tiered lottery proposal could solve NBA's tanking problem</title>
      <description>NBA commissioner Adam Silver has proposed changes to the league's draft lottery to discourage teams from losing on purpose. Now there's a new wrinkle that could dramatically change the incentives for losing.</description>
      <pubDate>11 Apr 2026 00:49:34 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/tiered_lottery_proposal_could_solve_nbas_tanking_problem/s1_13132_43712109</link>

      <title>Celtics tie their own NBA record vs. Pelicans</title>
      <description>Two teams in NBA history had ever made 29 three-pointers in a game before this week. Friday night, the Boston Celtics became the second team in five nights to tie the single-game record for threes.</description>

    <item>
      <title>Nuggets extend winning streak despite resting starters vs. Thunder</title>
      <description>The Denver Nuggets didn't care enough about playoff seeding to play any of their starters Friday night. After the Oklahoma City Thunder sat nine rotation players themselves, they came away with their 11th straight game and clinched home-court advantage in the first round.</description>

    <item>
